title: CMN-133 Legend of the Strongest Amazoness Reiko Tragedy of Women Who Bravely Fight - Miki Hayama
overview: Do you like being teased by a strong older sister? A complete record of 21 SM action LADYs falling. Investigator, ninja, female hero, special agent, future warrior... The story of the female protagonist who was captured in vain and turned into a slave is heart-warming!
